question: what courses are offered at SEC?
response:
The college offers the following courses:

Undergraduate Courses (B.E. / B.Tech):
* Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
* Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security)
* Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI & ML)
* Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI & DS)
* Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE)
* Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)
* Information Technology (IT)
* Mechanical Engineering (MECH)
* Civil Engineering (CIVIL)

Postgraduate Courses (M.E. / MBA):
* M.E. — Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
* MBA — with specializations in Finance, Systems, HR, and Marketing
